name: Mango Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 can mango pulp from an Indian store (presweetened)
1 tsp crushed cardamom (from an Indian store)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the H'nH until nearly boiling.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk the egg yolk. Add the cardamom and egg yolk to the H'nH. Simmer for 5-10 minutes.
3. Turn off the heat. Add the condensed milk to the mixture and cool until room temperature.
4. Add the mango pulp and almonds to it and mix well. Freeze in an ice cream maker. If you do not have one, then prepare this 6 hours in advance and blend every hour to break any ice crystals until smooth and creamy. Take the ice cream out of the freezer 1 hour before serving so that the mango treat just melts on your mouth...
Difficulty: easy.
Precision: measure ingredients.
